name: Iron and Mangowood Wire Fruit Basket with Handles Black - Threshold™
description: This Iron and Wooden Wire Fruit Basket with Handles from Threshold™ helps you store your fruits or vegetables in one place. Made from metal with a wide open-top design, this fruit basket lets you store an ample amount of fruits or vegetables, while the two side wooden handles make it easy to carry from one place to another. Featuring a mesh design, this metal fruit basket allows for air to naturally ripen and keep fruits fresh. In a black finish with a wooden base, it features a classic wired design that easily coordinates with a variety of decor styles.
